text:
precept BuildingAccessBadgeRequest

field EmployeeName as string optional
field Department as string optional
field AccessReason as string optional maxlength 200
field ReviewerNote as string optional
field LowestRequestedFloor as number default 0
field HighestRequestedFloor as number default 0
field BadgePrinted as boolean default false
field RequestedFloors as set of number

rule RequestedFloors.count == 0 or LowestRequestedFloor <= HighestRequestedFloor because "Requested floor bounds must stay ordered"

state Draft initial
state Submitted
state Approved
state Issued
state Rejected

in Draft modify EmployeeName, Department, AccessReason, RequestedFloors editable

in Approved ensure LowestRequestedFloor > 0 because "Approved badges must grant at least one floor"
in Approved ensure HighestRequestedFloor >= LowestRequestedFloor because "Approved floor bounds must stay ordered"
in Issued ensure BadgePrinted because "Issued badges must be printed"

to Approved -> set BadgePrinted = false

event AddFloor(Floor as number)
on AddFloor ensure AddFloor.Floor > 0 because "Floors must be positive"

event RemoveFloor(Floor as number)
on RemoveFloor ensure RemoveFloor.Floor > 0 because "Floors must be positive"

event Submit
event Approve(Note as string optional notempty)
event Reject(Reason as string notempty)
event PrintBadge

from Draft on AddFloor
    -> add RequestedFloors AddFloor.Floor
    -> no transition
from Draft on RemoveFloor when RequestedFloors contains RemoveFloor.Floor
    -> remove RequestedFloors RemoveFloor.Floor
    -> no transition
from Draft on RemoveFloor
    -> reject "That floor is not currently requested"

from Draft on Submit when EmployeeName is set and Department is set and AccessReason is set and AccessReason.length >= 5 and RequestedFloors.count > 0
    -> set LowestRequestedFloor = RequestedFloors.min
    -> set HighestRequestedFloor = RequestedFloors.max
    -> transition Submitted
from Draft on Submit
    -> reject "A complete request needs employee details, a reason, and at least one floor"

from Submitted on Approve
    -> set ReviewerNote = Approve.Note
    -> transition Approved
from Submitted on Reject
    -> set ReviewerNote = Reject.Reason
    -> transition Rejected

from Approved on PrintBadge
    -> set BadgePrinted = true
    -> transition Issued
